revision.text:
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[cdo:12 nguŏk 5 hô̤ (nùng-lĭk)]][[ja:12月5日 (旧暦)]][[ko:음력 12월 5일]][[zh-min-nan:12 goe̍h 5 ji̍t (kū-le̍k)]][[zh-yue:十二月初五]][[zh:十二月初五]]
{{Not to be confused with|December 5|qq=December 5}}<!--why is this category always showing up as 347 members?-->
{{Globalize|article|Japan|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Chinese|1=十二月初五|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Expand Korean|1=음력 12월 5일|topic=hist|date=April 2025}} {{Lunisolar December|qq=}} '''December 5''' is the 5th day of the month {{ill|Layue|en|Layue|qid=Q905470|lt=December (Shiwasu)|1=Layue}}, the 12th month of the traditional {{ill|Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|ja|旧暦|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|1=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|11=Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|13=User:Immanuelle/Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}. Its {{ill|Rokuyō|ja|六曜|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Rokuyō|qq=}} day is {{ill|Butsumetsu|ja|仏滅|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Butsumetsu|1=Butsumetsu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q10886789}}. == Events == * {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}} 1st year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|539|en|539|qid=Q32891|lt=539|1=539}} {{ill|December 30|en|December 30|qid=Q2901|lt=December 30|1=December 30}}) – The 29th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kinmei|en|Emperor Kinmei|qid=Q329792|lt=Emperor Kinmei|1=Emperor Kinmei}}, ascended the throne. * {{ill|Empress Suiko|en|Empress Suiko|qid=Q298057|lt=Empress Suiko|1=Empress Suiko}} 11th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|604|en|604|qid=Q31048|lt=604|1=604}} {{ill|January 11|en|January 11|qid=Q2247|lt=January 11|1=January 11}}) – {{ill|Prince Shōtoku|en|Prince Shōtoku|qid=Q263972|lt=Prince Shōtoku|1=Prince Shōtoku}} established the system of the {{ill|Twelve Level Cap and Rank System|en|Twelve Level Cap and Rank System|qid=Q2448809|lt=Kanmuri Jūnikai|1=Twelve Level Cap and Rank System}}. * {{ill|Zhenguan|en|Zhenguan|qid=Q3577278|lt=Jinguan (Tang)|1=Zhenguan}} 18th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|645|en|645|qid=Q31040|lt=645|1=645}} {{ill|January 8|en|January 8|qid=Q2234|lt=January 8|1=January 8}}) – The Tang monk {{ill|Xuanzang|ja|玄奘三蔵|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Xuanzang|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 玄奘|1=Xuanzang|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q42063}} returned to China after a 16-year journey touring India and other regions. * {{ill|Emperor Tenji|en|Emperor Tenji|qid=Q314802|lt=Emperor Tenji|1=Emperor Tenji}} 10th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|672|en|672|qid=Q30601|lt=672|1=672}} {{ill|January 9|en|January 9|qid=Q2238|lt=January 9|1=January 9}}) – Prince Ōtomo acceded, making him the 39th Emperor, {{ill|Emperor Kōbun|en|Emperor Kōbun|qid=Q357242|lt=Emperor Kōbun|1=Emperor Kōbun}}. * {{ill|Kaei|en|Kaei|qid=Q1146125|lt=Kaei|1=Kaei}} 6th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1854|en|1854|qid=Q7670|lt=1854|1=1854}} {{ill|January 3|en|January 3|qid=Q2156|lt=January 3|1=January 3}}) – A Russian envoy, {{ill|Yevfimiy Putyatin|en|Yevfimiy Putyatin|qid=Q957601|lt=Efim Pučarin|1=Yevfimiy Putyatin}}, visited again. In Nagasaki, discussions were held with the bakufu on border and trade matters. * {{ill|Ansei|en|Ansei|qid=Q1327259|lt=Ansei|1=Ansei}} 5th year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1859|en|1859|qid=Q7687|lt=1859|1=1859}} {{ill|January 8|en|January 8|qid=Q2234|lt=January 8|1=January 8}}) – {{ill|Chōshū Domain|en|Chōshū Domain|qid=Q876267|lt=Chōshū Domain|1=Chōshū Domain}}’s {{ill|Yoshida Shōin|en|Yoshida Shōin|qid=Q559747|lt=Yoshida Shōin|1=Yoshida Shōin}} was imprisoned. * {{ill|Keiō|en|Keiō|qid=Q776775|lt=Keiō|1=Keiō}} 2nd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1867|en|1867|qid=Q7715|lt=1867|1=1867}} {{ill|January 10|en|January 10|qid=Q2243|lt=January 10|1=January 10}}) – {{ill|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|en|Tokugawa Yoshinobu|qid=Q287657|lt=Tokugawa Yoshinobu|1=Tokugawa Yoshinobu}} assumed the title of {{ill|Shogun|en|Shogun|qid=Q131767|lt=Shōgun|1=Shogun}}. == Births == * {{ill|An'ei (Gengeng)|ja|安永|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/An'ei (Gengeng)|ja_comment=jawiki redirects to 安永 (元号)|1=An'ei|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q1193910}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1775|en|1775|qid=Q7700|lt=1775|1=1775}} {{ill|January 6|en|January 6|qid=Q2221|lt=January 6|1=January 6}}) – {{ill|Date Narimura|en|Date Narimura|qid=Q5227543|lt=Date Saimura|1=Date Narimura}}, head of the {{ill|Sendai Domain|en|Sendai Domain|qid=Q1062182|lt=Sendai Domain|1=Sendai Domain}} (died {{ill|1796|en|1796|qid=Q7818|lt=1796|1=1796}}). * {{ill|Bunkyū|en|Bunkyū|qid=Q730266|lt=Bunkyū|1=Bunkyū}} 3rd year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1864|en|1864|qid=Q7704|lt=1864|1=1864}} {{ill|January 13|en|January 13|qid=Q2255|lt=January 13|1=January 13}}) – {{ill|Kishida Toshiko|ja|岸田俊子|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kishida Toshiko|1=Kishida Toshiko|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q131227436}}, a feminist and writer (died {{ill|1901|en|1901|qid=Q2035|lt=1901|1=1901}}). == Deaths == * {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}} 68th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|31 BC|en|31 BC|qid=Q38170|lt=31 BC|1=31 BC}} {{ill|December 5|en|December 5|qid=Q2300|lt=December 5|1=December 5}}) – {{ill|Emperor Sujin|en|Emperor Sujin|qid=Q333530|lt=Emperor Sujin|1=Emperor Sujin}}, the 10th Emperor of Japan. * {{ill|Tenbun|ja|天文|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tenbun|1=Tenmon|comment=changed title based on wikidata|qid=Q21096812}} 4th year ({{ill|Julian calendar|en|Julian calendar|qid=Q11184|lt=Julian calendar|1=Julian calendar}} {{ill|1535|en|1535|qid=Q6453|lt=1535|1=1535}} {{ill|December 29|en|December 29|qid=Q2862|lt=December 29|1=December 29}}) – {{ill|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|en|Matsudaira Kiyoyasu|qid=Q1041434|lt=Matsudaira Kiyotoyasu|1=Matsudaira Kiyoyasu}}, a warrior (born {{ill|1511|en|1511|qid=Q6188|lt=1511|1=1511}}). * {{ill|Man'en|en|Man'en|qid=Q1193862|lt=Man'en|1=Man'en}} 1st year ({{ill|Gregorian calendar|en|Gregorian calendar|qid=Q12138|lt=Gregorian calendar|1=Gregorian calendar}} {{ill|1861|en|1861|qid=Q7693|lt=1861|1=1861}} {{ill|January 15|en|January 15|qid=Q2260|lt=January 15|1=January 15}}) – An interpreter for Townsend Harris, {{ill|Henry Heusken|en|Henry Heusken|qid=Q3132832|lt=Henry Huusken|1=Henry Heusken}}, was assassinated by anti-foreign factions (born {{ill|1832|en|1832|qid=Q7584|lt=1832|1=1832}}).
== See Also == {{Lunar Calendar See Also|12|4|12|6|11|5|1|12|1205|qq=}} ==Notes== <references group="lower-alpha"/> ==References== {{reflist|qq=}} {{Japanese Lunisolar Calendar|qq=}}

[[ko:음력 12월 5일]] [[ja:12月5日 (旧暦)]] [[zh:十二月初五]]
